clusters.HTTP Client Core: This domain contains the core functionality for making HTTP requests, handling responses, managing sessions, and providing authentication and security features.
clusters.Development Tooling: This domain encompasses code quality tools, pre-commit hooks, linting, and formatting utilities that maintain code consistency and prevent errors during development.
clusters.CI/CD Automation: This domain includes automated workflows for testing, security scanning, package publishing, and repository maintenance that ensure code quality and deployment reliability.
clusters.Documentation: This domain handles the configuration, building, and styling of project documentation, including syntax highlighting themes and documentation generation tools.
clusters.Testing Infrastructure: This domain provides testing frameworks, test servers, compatibility utilities, and test cases that validate the HTTP client functionality across various scenarios.
clusters.Package Management: This domain handles package setup, version validation, dependency compatibility, and distribution packaging for the Python library.
clusters.Project Administration: This domain manages project-level configurations including funding information, dependency updates, issue management, and repository maintenance policies.
